ddls:
CREATE TABLE "measures" (
  "measure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measure */,
  "measure_name" TEXT /* Name of the measure */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measure */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., percentage, count) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., conviction, acquittal) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the measure was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the measure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_periods" (
  "time_period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time period */,
  "time_period_name" TEXT /* Name of the time period */,
  "time_period_type" TEXT /* Type of time period (e.g., Year, Quarter, Month) */,
  "time_period_start" TEXT /* Start date of the time period */,
  "time_period_end" TEXT /* End date of the time period */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the time period was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the time period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ethnicities" (
  "ethnicity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ethnicity */,
  "ethnicity_name" TEXT /* Name of the ethnicity */,
  "ethnicity_type" TEXT /* Type of ethnicity classification (e.g., ONS 5+1 2001) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ethnicity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the ethnicity was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the ethnicity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ethnicity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genders" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender */,
  "gender_name" TEXT /* Name of the gender */,
  "gender_type" TEXT /* Type of gender classification (e.g., Male/Female/Not known/All) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gender */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the gender was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the gender */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group */,
  "age_group_type" TEXT /* Type of age group classification (e.g., Juveniles/Adults/All) */,
  "age_range_start" INTEGER /* Start age of the age group */,
  "age_range_end" INTEGER /* End age of the age group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the age group was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "measure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measure */,
  "time_period_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time period */,
  "ethnicity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ethnicity */,
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gender */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the age group */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the measure (e.g., percentage) */,
  "denominator" INTEGER /* Denominator value for the measure */,
  "numerator" INTEGER /* Numerator value for the measure */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data point was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the data point */,
  "source_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the data source */,
  "quality_score" INTEGER /* A score indicating the quality of the data (e.g., 1-10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_gender_id FOREIGN KEY ("gender_id") REFERENCES genders ("gender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_ethnicity_id FOREIGN KEY ("ethnicity_id") REFERENCES ethnicities ("ethnicity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_measure_id FOREIGN KEY ("measure_id") REFERENCES measures ("measure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_time_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("time_period_id") REFERENCES time_periods ("time_period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL or reference to the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data source was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the data source */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_source_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the link was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the link */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_links_data_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_point_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_links_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data point */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data point was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access log was created */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_point_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., CSV, JSON, Excel) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the file was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_point_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_point_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the readme file (e.g., TXT, PDF) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the readme file was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the readme file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_data_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_point_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_point_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data" (
  "external_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external data entry */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of the external data (e.g., census data) */,
  "data_year" TEXT /* Year of the external data */,
  "data_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the external data file */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the external data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the external data */,
  "source_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the external data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("external_data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point */,
  "external_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the external data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the link was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the link */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_external_data_links_external_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("external_data_id") REFERENCES external_data ("external_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_external_data_links_data_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_point_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_point_id")
)
